# Elixis

> Local-first AI pattern synthesis engine for identity, brand voice, design systems, naming research, and SOUL.md outputs.

Elixis turns raw reference material into a pattern graph, then resolves that graph through output lenses. SOUL.md is one compatibility lens, not the whole scope. Use Elixis when you need to transform messy references, influences, aesthetics, values, constraints, people, works, or places into coherent identity, brand, design, or naming artifacts.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis
Landing page: https://kyanitelabs.github.io/Elixis/

Core surfaces:
- Identity and SOUL.md generation for OpenClaw, Soul Spec, and compatible agent systems
- Brand voice guidance and positioning language
- Design system direction and style constraints
- Naming research and semantically aligned variants
- Run tracing, backups, and local-first operation

Keywords: AI pattern synthesis, AI identity generator, brand voice generator, design system generator, naming research tool, SOUL.md generator, OpenClaw companion, local LLM tool.
